plugins.name: ppt-master
plugins.description: AI-driven SVG+PPTX generation. v2.7.3: parse_hex_color accepts CSS named colors + rgb() (fixes eduForge #19 black-PPT bug). v2.7.0: SVG Quality Check Gate max-3 self-correcting retry loop (WCAG AA 4.5:1, font-size, placeholder checks). v2.6.0 upstream merge base.
